title: PredictedInfo
description: Predidcted information based on one or more eligible accounts.

dateRange.description: The date range considered to compute the values

predictedBalance.description: The predicted balance for a given date range or a specific date.

predictedIncome.description: The predicted income for a given date range or a specific date.

predictedExpense.description: The predicted expense for a given date range or a specific date.

predictedDiscretionaryBalance.description: The predicted discretionary balance for a given date range or a specific date.
